key_files.relevance: Primary target file - contains the release workflow to be updated
Already has bundle.targets = ['app', 'dmg'] - no changes needed here
Uses tauri version 2 - need compatible tauri-cli version for cargo tauri build
Reference for CI patterns - still uses cargo build (not tauri build) for CI

patterns.name: matrix-strategy-os-targeting
patterns.description: Release workflow uses matrix strategy with macos-latest (arm64), macos-13 (x64), ubuntu-latest targets

patterns.name: shasum-checksum
patterns.description: macOS uses 'shasum -a 256', Linux uses 'sha256sum' for checksum generation

patterns.name: path-six-levels-up
patterns.description: Current macOS packaging moves files 5 levels up (../../../../../../..) from bundle/macos - need to update to 6 levels for dmg step from bundle/dmg

patterns.name: draft-release
patterns.description: Release is created as draft:true to allow manual review before publishing

patterns.name: tauri-v2
patterns.description: Project uses Tauri 2, so needs tauri-cli version 2.x for cargo tauri build

architecture.release_flow: GitHub Actions matrix: checkout -> install uv -> install Rust -> install Tauri deps (Linux) -> build -> package -> upload
architecture.signing: Ad-hoc signing via signingIdentity: '-' in tauri.conf.json

extension_points.name: Build release step
extension_points.description: Replace cargo build with cargo tauri build - requires installing tauri-cli first

extension_points.name: Package macOS step
extension_points.description: Add DMG handling after the app tarball creation

extension_points.name: Release body
extension_points.description: Update macOS instructions to reference DMG as primary distribution

testing.note: This is a CI/CD workflow change. Verification is by code review of YAML correctness - cannot run actual GitHub Actions locally. Test by inspecting the workflow YAML structure.

conventions: Uses astral-sh/setup-uv@v4 for Python package management
